title: Immersive Infinity
description: Immersive Portals + An ever expanding list of portal compatibility from your favourite mods!
body:
Requires Immersive Portals!
(WARNING: Immersive Portals Forge custom portal generation is currently BROKEN on all 1.19.X versions! There isn't currently a workaround, sorry!)

(SECOND WARNING: 1.16.5 Immersive Portals is very buggy and sometimes does not cooperate with my mod, specifically if you aren't using Advent of Ascension. Beware!)

Ever look at the Immersive Portals mod and go "Man I really wish it was for this specific dimension I like", well not anymore! Introducing Immersive Infinity, an ever expanding mod/datapack that will consume all of my freetime! I will be adding mod compatibility as time goes on. Currently, it has 11 mods it supports:

  Axon Technologies (Buggy, Make sure to use latest versions, old versions on curseforge are unsupported at the moment)

  Shadowlands (Buggy, takes awhile to load, but works)

  Project Alpha
  
  DivineRPG
  
  The Undergarden
  
  The Below Bedrock Caves (Buggy)
  
  Esencia
  
  Exotelcraft (Buggy)
  
  Liroth Revamped
  
  Deeper and Darker
  
  Sculk Depths
  
  Villagers and Monsters Legacy
  
  Xenoclus 2

  Voidscape

  Twilight Forest

  Aether

  Blue Skies

  The Unseen

  Astral Dimension

  Aerial Hell

  Ore Portal

And most of all, now supports Advent of Ascension/Nevermine!
(Note for Advent of Ascension; you will need to go into the portal a couple of times for Immersive Portals to recognize the portals, and the Nowhere dimension simply doesn't work. Besides that, I had no issues.)

This was mainly just a test to see what's possible for me to do. Sinytra Connector is needed for any of the Forge 1.20.1 versions of the mods listed above, as Immersive Portals (Forge) Only supports up to 1.19.3.

Visit my Discord to recommend me what mods I should support next & for mod help.
:3
